caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a beige Nehru jacket over a lighter-colored long-sleeved shirt, speaks from behind a podium. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green stone wall with a geometric pattern. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. To his side, a tall, slender wooden pillar holds a small arrangement of red flowers. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression and gestures change; he initially looks forward with a neutral expression and then looks slightly to the side. In one instance, he raises his right hand and points his index finger upward to emphasize a point. The camera remains static throughout the sequence, keeping him centered as he delivers his address.
